info.name: Peyflex API Documentation
info.description:
🔰 Welcome to Peyflex Public API

Our API provides seamless access to core services, including airtime top-up, data top-up, etc.

This platform is built for developers, resellers, and fintech integrators who want to power their own apps, websites, or systems using our reliable infrastructure.

🔗 Base URL

Base URL is https://client.peyflex.com.ng

📌 Authentication

All sensitive endpoints require a valid API token. You can generate and manage your token from your user dashboard.

📞 Support

Need help? Contact our support team for any help. We are always very active.

request.description: Description: Returns the authenticated user's profile details, including full name, email, phone number, and other personal info.

request.description: Description: Retrieves the current wallet balance of the authenticated user.

Peyflex Airtime Purchase API

Welcome to our Airtime API, your fast, reliable, and developer-friendly gateway to automate airtime top-ups across all major Nigerian networks, including MTN, GLO, Airtel, and 9mobile.

Built for scale and optimized for speed, this API allows you to seamlessly integrate airtime recharge into your mobile apps, websites, or reseller platforms.

What You Can Do

  • Fetch available mobile networks and configurations

  • Perform instant airtime top-ups

  • Receive clean, actionable responses with detailed status

  • Rate-limited per user to prevent abuse and double-billing
Description: Returns a list of supported airtime networks along with their internal network IDs. No authentication is required. Just direct get.
Description: Initiates an airtime top-up for a mobile number.

Our Data Purchase API

Our Data API allows businesses and developers to automate data bundle purchases across all major Nigerian networks, MTN, Airtel, GLO, and 9mobile — with ease and speed.

⚙️ What You Can Do

  • Retrieve available network providers and their data plans

  • Purchase data instantly for any Nigerian mobile number

  • Token-authenticated with rate limiting to prevent abuse
Description: Returns a list of all active data networks, each with its name and identifier. The identifier is used to fetch plans and also initiate purchases.

Description: Returns the available data plans for a specific network (e.g., mtn_sme_data, glo_data, etc).

Example: /api/data/plans/?network=network_id || /api/data/plans/?network=mtn_sme_data

response.name: Query Data Plans

request.description: Description: Initiates the actual data purchase request top-up for a mobile number.

Our Cable TV Recharge API

With our Cable TV API, you can enable DSTV, GOTV, and Startimes subscription payments directly from your system. Fast and flexible.

⚙️ What You Can Do

  • Fetch supported cable TV providers and subscription plans

  • Verify IUC numbers before payment

  • Subscribe or renew packages in real-time

response.name: List Cable Plan Codes

request.description: Description: Validates a customer's Cable TV IUC number. Authentication is required for this endpoint.
Description: Charges the user's wallet and processes the Cable TV recharge for the given IUC number.

Our Electricity Recharge API

Our Electricity API gives your platform access to smart prepaid meter top-up functionality across major DISCOs in Nigeria.

⚙️ What You Can Do

  • Fetch available electricity providers and plan types

  • Verify meter numbers before purchase

  • Instantly recharge prepaid meters
Description: Returns the available electricity plans for the 'electricity' identifier. No token required.

response.name: Get Electricity Plans

request.description: Description: Validates a customer's meter number with the provider. No authentication required. Just direct.
Charges the user's wallet and processes the electricity bill payment for the given meter.
